data.description:
Self-described back-compat shim: 'Do NOT delete until a grep audit confirms no additional callers remain.' Audit done: both llm-format tests import ticket_reducer.llm_format directly (test_ticket_llm_format.py:20, test_ticket_reducer_llm_format.py); remaining mentions are comments + a NEGATIVE guard in test-ticket-transition-flock.sh:218-244 asserting it is NOT referenced inside the flock section (stays green after deletion).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] git rm src/rebar/_engine/ticket-llm-format.py
- [ ] Flock-guard test comment reworded if needed; both llm-format suites green
- [ ] Full suite green
data.title: Delete orphan shim: ticket-llm-format.py (grep audit now complete)
